rationale: The citing paper references Ding (2007) only in a grouped citation with Ding, Grewal, and Liechty (2005) as an example of incentive-aligned conjoint studies. The citation serves background positioning in the related-literature section, where the authors contrast their budget-constraint approach with prior incentive-alignment approaches on practical grounds (cost, implementation, possible income effects). The paper does not use Ding (2007)'s specific mechanism, results, or assumptions in its model development or empirical analysis.
